2605.02584.title: Beyond State Machines: Executing Network Procedures with Agentic Tool-Calling Sequences
2605.02584.paper_summary: Agentic AI will be an essential enabling technology for designing future mobile communication systems, which could provide flexible and customized services, automate complex network operations, and drive autonomous decision-making across the network. This work studies how Large Language Model (LLM)-based network AI agents can be utilized to execute network procedures expressed as sequences of tool invocations. We investigate four approaches, which differ in how the agent obtains the procedure and in how execution is distributed between the agent and the underlying tools. We evaluated the latency and execution correctness across these approaches using a User Equipment (UE) IP allocation procedure as a case study. Furthermore, we conduct a stress test to examine how many sequential procedural steps an LLM agent can reliably execute before failure. Our results show that approaches relying on iterative agent-side reasoning incur higher latency and are more prone to execution errors, while approaches where the procedure is encapsulated within a single tool, which internally orchestrates the required steps by invoking other tools, reduce latency by limiting repeated reasoning. The stress-test results further show that the model with advanced tool-calling capability maintains reliable execution over longer procedures than the other evaluated models; however, all models exhibit reliability degradation as procedure length increases, revealing clear execution limits in multi-step tool-based workflows. To systematically analyze failures in procedure execution, we introduce a procedure-specific error taxonomy that categorizes deviations in multi-step procedural execution.
2605.02584.paper_summary_zh: 代理人工智慧將成為設計未來行動通信系統的重要技術，這些系統可以提供靈活和定制的服務，自動化複雜的網絡操作，並推動網絡中的自主決策。這項工作研究了基於大型語言模型（LLM）的網絡人工智慧代理如何被用來執行表達為工具調用序列的網絡程序。我們調查了四種方法，這些方法在代理獲取程序的方式以及執行在代理和底層工具之間的分配上有所不同。我們使用用戶設備（UE）IP分配程序作為案例研究，評估了這些方法的延遲和執行正確性。此外，我們進行了壓力測試，以檢查LLM代理在失敗之前可以可靠執行多少個順序程序步驟。我們的結果顯示，依賴於迭代代理端推理的方法會產生更高的延遲，並且更容易出現執行錯誤，而將程序封裝在單一工具內部的方法，該工具通過調用其他工具內部協調所需步驟，則通過限制重複推理來減少延遲。壓力測試的結果進一步顯示，具有先進工具調用能力的模型在較長程序上保持可靠執行的能力超過其他評估模型；然而，所有模型在程序長度增加時都顯示出可靠性下降，揭示了多步驟基於工具的工作流程中的明確執行限制。為了系統地分析程序執行中的失敗，我們引入了一種程序特定的錯誤分類法，對多步驟程序執行中的偏差進行分類。
2605.02584.author: Purna Sai Garigipati et.al.
2605.02584.authors: Purna Sai Garigipati, Onur Ayan, Kishor Chandra Joshi, Xueli An
